# TagsInput

A tag/chip input component for entering and managing multiple values as tags. Users can type, add, and remove individual tags.

## Import

```jsx
import { TagsInput } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `TagsInput` | The root wrapper that manages the tag values |
| `TagsInput.Control` | Container for the tags and the input field |
| `TagsInput.Input` | The text input where users type new tags |
| `TagsInput.Item` | An individual tag/chip element |
| `TagsInput.ItemText` | The text content of a tag |
| `TagsInput.ItemDeleteTrigger` | Button to remove an individual tag |
| `TagsInput.Label` | A label for the tags input |
| `TagsInput.ClearTrigger` | Button to clear all tags at once |
| `TagsInput.HiddenInput` | Hidden input for form submission |
| `TagsInput.Items` | Container for rendering all tag items |
| `TagsInput.ItemInput` | Editable input within a tag item (for inline editing) |
| `TagsInput.ItemPreview` | Preview text of a tag item being edited |

## TagsInput (Root) Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `value` | `string[]` | - | Controlled array of tag values |
| `defaultValue` | `string[]` | - | Initial tag values for uncontrolled usage |
| `onValueChange` | `(details: { value: string[] }) => void` | - | Callback fired when the tags change |
| `max` | `number` | - | Maximum number of tags allowed |
| `allowDuplicates` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether duplicate tag values are allowed |
| `delimiter` | `string` | - | Character delimiter that triggers tag creation (e.g., `","`) |
| `validate` | `(details: { value: string }) => boolean` | - | Validation function for new tag values |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the input is disabled |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the root element |

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
<TagsInput defaultValue={["React", "Vue"]}>
  <TagsInput.Label>Technologies</TagsInput.Label>
  <TagsInput.Control>
    <TagsInput.Input placeholder="Add a tag..." />
  </TagsInput.Control>
</TagsInput>
```

### With tag items rendered

```jsx
const [tags, setTags] = useState(["React", "Vue", "Angular"]);

<TagsInput value={tags} onValueChange={(e) => setTags(e.value)}>
  <TagsInput.Label>Frameworks</TagsInput.Label>
  <TagsInput.Control>
    {tags.map((tag) => (
      <TagsInput.Item key={tag} value={tag}>
        <TagsInput.ItemText>{tag}</TagsInput.ItemText>
        <TagsInput.ItemDeleteTrigger />
      </TagsInput.Item>
    ))}
    <TagsInput.Input placeholder="Add framework..." />
  </TagsInput.Control>
  <TagsInput.HiddenInput />
</TagsInput>
```

### With max tags

```jsx
<TagsInput max={5} defaultValue={["Tag1", "Tag2"]}>
  <TagsInput.Control>
    <TagsInput.Input placeholder="Max 5 tags" />
  </TagsInput.Control>
</TagsInput>
```

### With clear all button

```jsx
<TagsInput defaultValue={["React", "Vue"]}>
  <TagsInput.Control>
    <TagsInput.Input placeholder="Add tag..." />
  </TagsInput.Control>
  <TagsInput.ClearTrigger>Clear All</TagsInput.ClearTrigger>
</TagsInput>
```

### With editable tag items

```jsx
const [tags, setTags] = useState(["React", "Vue", "Angular"]);

<TagsInput value={tags} onValueChange={(e) => setTags(e.value)}>
  <TagsInput.Label>Frameworks</TagsInput.Label>
  <TagsInput.Control>
    <TagsInput.Items>
      {tags.map((tag) => (
        <TagsInput.Item key={tag} value={tag}>
          <TagsInput.ItemPreview>{tag}</TagsInput.ItemPreview>
          <TagsInput.ItemInput />
          <TagsInput.ItemDeleteTrigger />
        </TagsInput.Item>
      ))}
    </TagsInput.Items>
    <TagsInput.Input placeholder="Add framework..." />
  </TagsInput.Control>
  <TagsInput.HiddenInput />
</TagsInput>
```

### With validation

```jsx
<TagsInput
  validate={(details) => details.value.length >= 2}
  defaultValue={["OK"]}
>
  <TagsInput.Control>
    <TagsInput.Input placeholder="Min 2 chars per tag" />
  </TagsInput.Control>
</TagsInput>
```

## Features

- Compound component pattern for fully customizable tag input layouts
- Add tags by pressing Enter or using a custom delimiter
- Remove individual tags or clear all tags at once
- Maximum tag count and duplicate prevention
- Custom validation function for new tag values
- Hidden input for native form submission
- Each sub-component forwards refs to its underlying DOM element
